[4-8] The view cuts to a white plate serving the salad, removing the text overlay. Green florets, dark dried fruit, and cheese cubes coated in dressing are visible in a static shot. [8-14] The scene transitions to a white background for a logo animation. Black script text spells "The Cooking," accompanied by a chef's hat on the initial 'C' and a ribbon banner with spoon and fork icons appearing below. The video displays the logo "The Cooking FOODIE," with "FOODIE" in white capital letters inside a black ribbon banner. The scene transitions to a kitchen setting where the logo becomes a semi-transparent overlay in the top left. A hand uses a large silver knife to chop green broccoli on a light wooden cutting board, while white text reading "Broccoli" and "2 heads, chop" appears in the bottom left. The hand continues slicing the vegetable stems and florets into increasingly smaller pieces, creating a large pile

[40-44] A hand uses a large silver knife to slice a red apple wedge into small cubes on a light wooden cutting board. A growing pile of diced apple pieces with red skin and pale yellow flesh accumulates on the right side. White text in the bottom left corner reads "Apple 1, chop" as the chopping continues. The scene transitions to a large clear glass bowl containing chopped green broccoli florets and diced purple onion, with a pile of diced apple pieces sitting on top of the other ingredients.
[44-48] White text overlays the bottom left corner, reading "Dried cranberries" followed by "1/2 cup (65g)," signaling the next ingredient for the salad mixture. Dark red dried cranberries are poured into the glass bowl from above, settling on top of the chopped apple, red onion, and green broccoli mixture.
[48-50] Sunflower seeds are poured into the bowl containing chopped broccoli, red onion, apple, and cranberries. The small grey and white striped seeds cascade heavily over the colorful ingredients, forming a layer on top. The text overlay changes to display "Sunflower seeds" and the quantity "1/3 cup (45g)" in the bottom left corner as the seeds are added to the salad.

[52-54] Small grey sunflower seeds are poured over chopped broccoli, apple, red onion, and dried cranberries in a glass bowl. The text "Sunflower seeds 1/3 cup (45g)" is visible in the bottom left. [54-58] The scene shifts to a black speckled frying pan on a stovetop where a hand pours brown pecans from a white bowl. Text displays "Pecans" and "3/4 cup (90g)", changing to "toast" as nuts settle. [58-60] The pan is shaken to toast the pecans, keeping the "toast" label visible. [60-62] A white circular "LIKE" graphic with a black thumbs-up appears; a cursor clicks it, turning the icon red with white sparkles while pecans toast below.

[62-64] The 'LIKE' graphic vanishes, replaced by a red circle containing a white bell icon. A cursor hand clicks the bell, generating white sparkles, while brown pecans continue to tumble and toast within the black speckled frying pan. [64-68] A red rectangular button labeled "SUBSCRIBE" appears centrally. A cursor clicks the button, transforming it into a white rectangle reading "SUBSCRIBED" beside a bell icon. The cursor clicks the bell, causing a blue "NOTIFICATIONS ENABLED" banner to appear above. Brown pecans continue to sit in the black frying pan underneath the overlay graphics. [68-70] The blue banner reading "NOTIFICATIONS ENABLED" and white "SUBSCRIBED" button overlay the brown pecans until the graphics vanish, revealing the plain toasted nuts in the pan.

[72-74] Toasted brown pecans are poured from a black speckled frying pan onto a light wooden cutting board as the pan tilts, causing the nuts to slide out and scatter. [74-80] A hand wielding a large silver knife begins to roughly chop the pile of nuts. The blade moves up and down, slicing through the toasted brown pecans and breaking them into smaller, irregular fragments. White text reading "roughly chop" appears in the bottom left corner as the chopping action commences and continues. The white logo remains visible in the top left corner.

recent_thinks.text: A hand uses a large knife to slice a halved red onion on a wooden cutting board. White text in the bottom left reads "Red onion" and "1/2, chop". The blade cuts through the purple vegetable, beginning to dice it into small pieces while the channel logo remains in the top left corner.

A hand secures a red apple wedge with pale yellow flesh on a light wooden cutting board. A large silver knife slices downward through the fruit, cutting it into thinner pieces. White text in the bottom left corner displays "Apple" and "1, chop" throughout the action.

Small grey sunflower seeds are poured into the glass bowl, forming a large pile on top of the chopped broccoli, apple, red onion, and dried cranberries. The text overlay reading "Sunflower seeds 1/3 cup (45g)" stays in the bottom left corner as the seeds settle.

The blue "NOTIFICATIONS ENABLED" banner and white "SUBSCRIBED" button with a bell icon disappear from the frame. The view clears to show only the brown toasted pecans resting in the black speckled frying pan, removing the previous overlay graphics.

A hand continues to use a large silver knife to roughly chop the pile of toasted brown pecans on the light wooden cutting board. The blade moves rhythmically, breaking the nuts into smaller, irregular fragments while the white text "roughly chop" remains in the bottom left corner.

A hand secures a red apple wedge with pale yellow flesh on a light wooden cutting board. A large silver knife slices downward through the fruit, cutting it into thinner pieces. White text in the bottom left corner displays "Apple" and "1, chop" throughout the action.

Small grey sunflower seeds are poured into the glass bowl, forming a large pile on top of the chopped broccoli, apple, red onion, and dried cranberries. The text overlay reading "Sunflower seeds 1/3 cup (45g)" stays in the bottom left corner as the seeds settle.

The blue "NOTIFICATIONS ENABLED" banner and white "SUBSCRIBED" button with a bell icon disappear from the frame. The view clears to show only the brown toasted pecans resting in the black speckled frying pan, removing the previous overlay graphics.

Thick white mayonnaise flows from a small white bowl held by a hand into a clear glass bowl resting on a wooden table. The creamy ingredient piles up at the bottom as the pouring continues. Text overlay in the bottom left displays "Mayonnaise 1/2 cup (115g)" in white font.

A hand pours thick white mayonnaise from a small white bowl into a clear glass bowl on a wooden surface. The creamy substance accumulates in a mound at the bottom of the clear bowl. White text in the bottom left corner reads "Mayonnaise 1/2 cup (115g)".

A hand pours thick white sour cream from a small white bowl into the clear glass bowl containing mayonnaise. The creamy ingredient accumulates on top of the mayonnaise mound. White text in the bottom left corner displays "Sour cream 1/2 cup (120g)" in white font.

A hand tilts a small white bowl to pour thick white sour cream into a clear glass bowl resting on a wooden table. The creamy ingredient accumulates on top of the mayonnaise mound. White text in the bottom left corner displays "Sour cream 1/2 cup (120g)".

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A bowl of creamy broccoli salad mixed with red onions, nuts, and cheese is shown. The text "BROCCOLI" in green and "SALAD" in white overlays the center, then fragments with a digital glitch effect. The "The Cooking Foodie" logo remains in the top left. [4-8] The view cuts to a white plate serving the salad, removing the text overlay. Green florets, dark dried fruit, and cheese cubes coated in dressing are visible in a static shot. [8-14] The scene transitions to a white background for a logo animation. Black script text spells "The Cooking," accompanied by a chef's hat on the initial 'C' and a ribbon banner with spoon and fork icons appearing below. The video displays the logo "The Cooking FOODIE," with "FOODIE" in white capital letters inside a black ribbon banner. The scene transitions to a kitchen setting where the logo becomes a semi-transparent overlay in the top left. A hand uses a large silver knife to chop green broccoli on a light wooden cutting board, while white text reading "Broccoli" and "2 heads, chop" appears in the bottom left. The hand continues slicing the vegetable stems and florets into increasingly smaller pieces, creating a large pile

[72-74] Toasted brown pecans are poured from a black speckled frying pan onto a light wooden cutting board as the pan tilts, causing the nuts to slide out and scatter. [74-80] A hand wielding a large silver knife begins to roughly chop the pile of nuts. The blade moves up and down, slicing through the toasted brown pecans and breaking them into smaller, irregular fragments. White text reading "roughly chop" appears in the bottom left corner as the chopping action commences and continues. The white logo remains visible in the top left corner.

[80-86] A hand continues to use a large silver knife to roughly chop the pile of toasted brown pecans on the light wooden cutting board. The blade moves rhythmically, breaking the nuts into smaller, irregular fragments while the white text "roughly chop" remains in the bottom left corner and the channel logo stays in the top left. [86-88] The roughly chopped brown pecans are poured into the clear glass bowl, falling over the sunflower seeds, dried cranberries, and broccoli florets. The nuts accumulate on top of the colorful salad mixture, adding a textured layer to the dish.

[88-90] Chopped brown pecans settle into a large pile on top of a mixture of sunflower seeds, dried cranberries, and broccoli in a clear glass bowl, creating a thick, textured layer covering the colorful salad ingredients below.
